data.name: Crawling Lab
data.detailed_description:
“Crawling Lab,” a secret laboratory built by Selen Industry deep in the mountains.
Here, a new product using the newly developed artificial life form "Biodoll" was being researched.
But one day, a web-crawling AI hijacks a new Biodoll and
An incident occurs in which she calls herself the "Crawl Queen" and takes control of all the facilities in the laboratory.
The protagonist is sent on a mission to retrieve research materials from the laboratory.
However, the protagonist is left alone in the laboratory due to an unexpected accident during the retrieve operation...
Will he be able to escape from the laboratory controlled by the Crawling Queen?

Stock up on ammo, upgrade your guns, defeat the Crawling Queen's minions and escape the lab.


- Attractive enemy biodolls
- Combat using guns
- Various traits and upgrades
- Simple controls
- Extra contents unlocked after ending

data.short_description: Stock up on ammo, upgrade your guns, defeat the Crawling Queen's minions and escape the lab.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 韓文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: All newer version of Windows 10 (newer than version 1909.1350) and Windows 11 with support for DirectX 12 Agility SDK are supported.
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 12 (with Shader Model 6.6 atomics), or Vulkan (VK_KHR_shader_atomic_int64)
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: All newer version of Windows 10 (newer than version 1909.1350) and Windows 11 with support for DirectX 12 Agility SDK are supported.
  • Processor: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 12 (with Shader Model 6.6 atomics), or Vulkan (VK_KHR_shader_atomic_int64)
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
